title: scutellaria brevibracteata subsp. brevibracteata
intro: Scutellaria brevibracteata subsp. brevibracteata, commonly known as blue skullcap or short-bracted skullcap, is a perennial plant species in the mint family (Lamiaceae) that is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to calm the nervous system and reduce anxiety. The health benefits of Scutellaria brevibracteata subsp. brevibracteata include relief from insomnia, stress, and anxiety, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cognitive function. Scutellaria brevibracteata subsp. brevibracteata can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and capsules, which allow for its medicinal properties to be easily absorbed and utilized by the body.
